message:
feat(unicode): Add character width override system

New thread-safe API for per-character width overrides:
- set_width_override(ch, width): Set custom width for a character
- get_width_override(ch): Query override if set
- clear_width_overrides(): Reset all overrides

Implementation:
- Uses OnceLock<RwLock<HashMap>> for lazy init + concurrent access
- AtomicBool fast-path: skips RwLock when no overrides configured
- Overrides take precedence in display_width calculations

Use cases:
- Terminal emulators with non-standard width tables
- Emoji rendering variations (width-1 vs width-2)
- Testing with controlled width behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
